dungeon: ROTF MARATHON realm-farming stream (v1.3) — ~201 dungeon entries. SAMPLED (not exhaustive). Confirms Craig + God of Reptilians taunts; rich /25 realm event feed; Lucky-X meme-boss family. GENUINE ROTF.
source: video disc_YC4vDxWTAyc (HUGE: 1815 f_, 2722 chat, 1361 minimap, 603 transitions = ~201 dungeon entries). A multi-hour realm/dungeon farming marathon (laganpaal-hosted, heavy 'gl' spam, youtube-livestream auto-message). Analyzed via contact sheet + a 25-transition sample + an 18-chat-crop sample. NOT exhaustively processed — see uncertain/flag.
map: Sampled transitions are DOMINATED by a repeated tan/SANDSTONE-DESERT dungeon (farmed many times), plus red-lava rock rooms, green grass/forest, a blue water/dock area, brown brick rooms, grey stone, and an orange crater arena. The desert repetition suggests farming one specific sandstone dungeon.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED: (1) /25 EVENT COUNTER again (this realm = /25, matching disc_XGl3pTaNmTM; reinforces that the denominator is per-realm, not fixed /30). (2) NAMED NPC ANNOUNCERS drive the event feed (Qhalan, Djinn, Spire, Lich, Goblin, Spider, Demon) — each boss spawn/defeat line is prefixed by a random narrator name (the mechanic behind the /N counter). (3) 'LUCKY-X' MEME BOSS FAMILY — recurring luck-themed event bosses: Lucky Ent God, Lucky Orion Bot (the earlier 'Lucky Lint God' read was 'Lucky Ent God'). (4) Server 'v1.3'. (5) Potion-of-X 'has been sent' (to vault, when maxed) lines recur. (6) Trade system ('/trade <name>').
uncertain: NOT EXHAUSTIVE — only ~25/201 transitions + 18/2722 chat crops sampled. The dominant SANDSTONE-DESERT dungeon (Egyptian/Gate-to-the-Underworld PRIORITY per cron) is farmed repeatedly but NO entry NAME was legible in the sampled transitions -> RECOMMEND a future dedicated unit to montage more of this tag's 603 transitions and read entry names (high chance of confirming Gate to the Underworld or a desert dungeon). Craig middle taunt still truncated.
confidence: HIGH for the sampled chat: Craig + God of Reptilians taunt re-confirms, the /25 event feed, Cookie Monster + Lucky Orion Bot spawns, named announcers. MEDIUM/LOW for full dungeon coverage (sampled only). GENUINE ROTF (v1.3). FLAG for a deeper transition-name pass.
